ValidationRule.description: If the status is Paid, then you must enter payment Date on or after Invoice Date.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c , AND( text(leaseworks__Status__c)=='Paid' , OR (isBlank(leaseworks__Payment_Date__c), leaseworks__Payment_Date__c < leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter Payment Date and must be on or after the Invoice Date.
